util.c(3) Library Functions Manual util.c(3)

NAME

util.c - Utility stubs for WASM/Emscripten (backtrace, localtime).

SYNOPSIS

Functions


int platform_backtrace (void **buffer, int size)
Get a backtrace of the current call stack. char ** platform_backtrace_symbols (void *const *buffer, int size)
Convert backtrace addresses to symbol names. void platform_backtrace_symbols_destroy (char **symbols)
Free symbol array from platform_backtrace_symbols(). void platform_print_backtrace_symbols (const char *label, char **symbols, int count, int skip_frames, int max_frames, backtrace_frame_filter_t filter)
void platform_print_backtrace (int skip_frames)
asciichat_error_t platform_localtime (const time_t *timer, struct tm *result)
Platform-safe localtime wrapper. int platform_isatty (int fd)
Check if a file descriptor is a terminal. void platform_clear_error_state (void)
bool platform_get_temp_dir (char *temp_dir, size_t path_size)
Get the system temporary directory path. bool platform_prompt_yes_no (const char *question, bool default_yes)
Prompt the user for a yes/no answer. int platform_get_last_error (void)
Get the last system error code. const char * platform_get_home_dir (void)
Get the user's home directory. void platform_normalize_path_separators (char *path)
Normalize path separators for the current platform. char * platform_get_config_dir (void)
Get the application configuration directory. bool platform_get_cwd (char *cwd, size_t path_size)
Get the current working directory of the process. int platform_path_strcasecmp (const char *a, const char *b, size_t n)
Platform-aware path string comparison. int platform_is_regular_file (const char *path)
Check if a path is a regular file.

Detailed Description

Utility stubs for WASM/Emscripten (backtrace, localtime).

Definition in file util.c.

Function Documentation

int platform_isatty (int fd)

Check if a file descriptor is a terminal.

Parameters

fd File descriptor to check

Returns

Non-zero if fd is a terminal, 0 otherwise

Definition at line 63 of file util.c.

63                             {
64   (void)fd;
65   return 1; // Always true for WASM terminal (xterm.js)
66 }




Referenced by session_display_create(),
    splash_intro_start(), terminal_is_stderr_tty(),
    terminal_is_stdin_tty(), terminal_is_stdout_tty(),
    terminal_should_color_output(),
    terminal_should_use_control_sequences(), and
    ui_status_display().






void
  platform_print_backtrace (int skip_frames)


Definition at line 44 of file util.c.


44                                                {
45   (void)skip_frames;
46   // No-op - backtrace not supported in WASM
47 }










void
  platform_print_backtrace_symbols (const char * label, char ** symbols, int
  count, int skip_frames, int max_frames, backtrace_frame_filter_t
  filter)


Definition at line 33 of file util.c.


34                                                                        {
35   (void)label;
36   (void)symbols;
37   (void)count;
38   (void)skip_frames;
39   (void)max_frames;
40   (void)filter;
41   // No-op - backtrace not supported in WASM
42 }
